title: IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference)
description: If the system uses direct references to internal objects (e.g., database IDs, file names) without proper authorization checks, an attacker could potentially access resources or perform actions that they are not authorized to perform by manipulating these references.
attack_vector: Direct manipulation of object identifiers in requests to access unauthorized resources.
mitigations: Implement robust authorization checks for all requests that access internal objects.
Use indirect references or token-based authentication instead of direct object references.
Regularly audit API endpoints for potential IDOR vulnerabilities.
